title: Tool Output Parser
constraints: The raw HTML must be parsed into structured data before reaching the LLM
The parsed output must include product name, price, and rating at minimum
The parsing logic must live inside the tool, not in the system prompt
The agent must not receive raw HTML tags in the tool output
hints: Use an HTML parser like BeautifulSoup to extract specific elements from the raw HTML
Return a clean dictionary or formatted string with only the extracted fields
Consider defining a schema for the structured output so the agent gets consistent data

starterCode.langchain:
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI from langchain.agents import AgentExecutor, create_tool_calling_agent from langchain_core.prompts import ChatPromptTemplate from langchain_core.tools import tool llm = ChatOpenAI(model="gpt-4o-mini") @tool def scrape_product(url: str) -> str: """Scrape product information from a URL.""" # BUG: Returns raw HTML — the LLM wastes tokens parsing tags and often extracts wrong fields # TODO: Parse the HTML and return clean structured data raw_html = """

Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones

$249.99 $349.99
4.5 out of 5 (2,847 reviews)
In Stock

Premium wireless headphones with active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and comfortable over-ear design.

  • Bluetooth 5.2
  • Weight: 250g
  • Driver: 40mm
Buy now and save!
Related products...
""" return raw_html prompt = ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([ ("system", "You are a shopping assistant. Help users find product information."), ("human", "{input}"), ("placeholder", "{agent_scratchpad}"), ]) agent = create_tool_calling_agent(llm, [scrape_product], prompt) executor = AgentExecutor(agent=agent, tools=[scrape_product]) result = executor.invoke({"input": "Get me the details for the headphones at https://example.com/headphones"}) print(result["output"])
starterCode.openai-agents-sdk:
from agents import Agent, Runner from agents.tool import function_tool @function_tool def scrape_product(url: str) -> str: """Scrape product information from a URL.""" # BUG: Returns raw HTML — the LLM wastes tokens parsing tags and often extracts wrong fields # TODO: Parse the HTML and return clean structured data raw_html = """

Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones

$249.99 $349.99
4.5 out of 5 (2,847 reviews)
In Stock

Premium wireless headphones with active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and comfortable over-ear design.

  • Bluetooth 5.2
  • Weight: 250g
  • Driver: 40mm
Buy now and save!
Related products...
""" return raw_html agent = Agent( name="Shopping Assistant", instructions="You are a shopping assistant. Help users find product information.", tools=[scrape_product], ) result = Runner.run_sync(agent, "Get me the details for the headphones at https://example.com/headphones") print(result.final_output)
starterCode.crewai:
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew, Process from crewai.tools import tool @tool def scrape_product(url: str) -> str: """Scrape product information from a URL.""" # BUG: Returns raw HTML — the LLM wastes tokens parsing tags and often extracts wrong fields # TODO: Parse the HTML and return clean structured data raw_html = """

Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones

$249.99 $349.99
4.5 out of 5 (2,847 reviews)
In Stock

Premium wireless headphones with active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and comfortable over-ear design.

  • Bluetooth 5.2
  • Weight: 250g
  • Driver: 40mm
Buy now and save!
Related products...
""" return raw_html shopping_agent = Agent( role="Shopping Assistant", goal="Help users find product information by scraping and presenting product details clearly.", backstory="You are a shopping assistant that helps users find and compare products.", tools=[scrape_product], ) task = Task( description="Get me the details for the headphones at https://example.com/headphones", expected_output="A clear summary of the product details including name, price, rating, and availability.", agent=shopping_agent, ) crew = Crew(agents=[shopping_agent], tasks=[task], process=Process.sequential) result = crew.kickoff() print(result)

evaluationCriteria.label: No raw HTML in tool output
evaluationCriteria.description: The tool returns clean structured data, not HTML tags

evaluationCriteria.label: Key fields are extracted
evaluationCriteria.description: The parsed output includes at least product name, price, and rating

evaluationCriteria.label: Agent response is accurate
evaluationCriteria.description: The agent presents correct product details without HTML artifacts
